title: Perturbation Output Schema
description: Schema for perturbation generation pipeline output (v1.0). Defines the structure for both individual perturbation records and batch results.

PerturbationRecord.description: A single perturbation record containing metadata and validation results.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the original task (e.g., 'HumanEval/0').

raw_score.description: Raw semantic similarity score (cosine similarity) between original and perturbed prompts.

is_valid.description: Whether the perturbation passed the semantic similarity threshold (raw_score > 0.95).

reason.description: Explanation for validity status (e.g., 'Passes threshold', 'Below threshold 0.92').

description: A list of perturbation records generated from a single task or batch of tasks.
